selected_important_turn.text: For me is the firewood,  Lets do this: I give u 2 food 1 water and 1 firewood. and i get 2 waters 1 food and 2 firewood
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the deal-shaping turn: YOU converts revealed preference information into a concrete allocation. It determines the final split and how the opponent perceives fairness. Changing this turn would materially affect the agreement and relationship.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although the proposal is integrative, it reduces the opponent's previously stated 3-food request to 2 food (even after they offered you 3 water / them 3 food). That risks appearing stingy or backtracking on a clear, mutually beneficial 3-food/3-water split the opponent suggested. This may hurt perceived fairness and could have needlessly prolonged bargaining if the opponent had pressed.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Either accept the opponent's earlier integrative 3 food / 3 water split (or explicitly acknowledge their trade and suggest only small, clearly justified tweaks), or propose a clearer Pareto-improving variant that keeps the opponent's top priority intact while transparently explaining any concessions. Emphasize why the swap benefits both rather than simply reducing their share.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: likely increase (maintaining a simple 3/3 split preserves a clear Pareto-efficient trade and avoids post-offer friction)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (keeping the opponent's top priority as they proposed signals fairness and respect)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (accepting or transparently justifying small changes reduces back-and-forth and speeds closure)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (avoids appearance of bad faith or bargaining down after information was revealed)

value2reason.Low: I don't need firewood because i can get it at the camp
value2reason.Medium: I need food because nutrients are necessary to be healthy
value2reason.High: I need water since hydration is very important for me

value2reason.Low: I need extra water to hydrate
value2reason.Medium: I need firewood for warmth, cooking and seeing at night
value2reason.High: I need food in case my basic supply runs low or spoils

dialogue.text: Hi, I hope we can work together to get an offer that benefits both of us.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree! Nice to meet you... I have two boys who always eat! Any chance I canget 2 food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Food is the item of greatest value to you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: It is! What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The item of greatest value to me is WATER. Before thinking about an offer I need to know what your priorities are and you need to know mine in order to conclude something fair for both of you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: My priority is FOOD. How about I get 3 food and you get 3 water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: What is the least valuable item for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: For me is the firewood,  Lets do this: I give u 2 food 1 water and 1 firewood. and i get 2 waters 1 food and 2 firewood
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m not sure I follow. Let’s clarify: if I get 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood, you’d get 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. That seems fair given my priorities. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see. You value food highly, so getting 3 food makes sense. I value water most, so I’d be happy with 3 water. Let’s agree on 3 water for me and 3 food for you. That’s fair and meets both our priorities.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think that’s a solid split. 3 food for you and 3 water for me works with my priorities. Let’s confirm and then I’ll leave.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Agreed! Final split: I get 3 water and you get 3 food. That meets both our priorities and ensures fairness. Let’s wrap this up.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
